notice: Creative and operational development edition. Prices, final availability, allergens, and dietary indicators require SIP approval before service.

collections.name: House Signatures
collections.description: Four permanent compositions that carry the clearest expression of SIP: memorable without excess, generous without noise, and unmistakable from the first sip.

drinks.name: Presence
drinks.menuLine: Blackberry · Assam Black Tea · Charred Orange · Allspice
drinks.description: Blackberry and black tea unfold through charred orange and warm allspice, then resolve into a dry mineral finish. Rich at first, composed from beginning to end.
drinks.closingLine: Stay for the moment. Remember the night.
drinks.method: Shake everything except the mineral water briefly with ice. Fine-strain over one large clear cube, add mineral water, and stir once.
drinks.garnish: Thin charred-orange crescent and one ripe blackberry on a minimal gold pick
drinks.experience: Dark fruit · structured tea · warm spice · dry mineral finish
drinks.pairing: Charred jerk mushrooms · roasted plantain · tamarind glaze
drinks.imageAlt: Presence zero-proof cocktail with blackberry, charred orange, clear ice, and a gold pick in a cut-crystal rocks glass.

drinks.name: Clarity
drinks.menuLine: Green Grape · Cucumber · Silver Needle White Tea · Citrus Blossom
drinks.description: Clarified green grape and cool cucumber meet white tea and citrus blossom in a pale, crystalline composition. Luminous at the opening, quietly floral through the middle, and mineral-dry at the finish.
drinks.closingLine: See the moment clearly.
drinks.method: Build over one long clear ice spear in a chilled highball. Add mineral water last and lift gently with a bar spoon.
drinks.garnish: Translucent cucumber ribbon and one tiny white edible blossom
drinks.experience: Cool cucumber · soft florals · luminous fruit · mineral-dry finish
drinks.pairing: Callaloo croquettes · green mango · cashew-lime crema
drinks.imageAlt: Clarity zero-proof cocktail with cucumber ribbon, clear ice spear, and white blossom in a tall crystal highball.

drinks.name: Legacy
drinks.menuLine: Jamaican Sorrel · Roasted Ginger · Pimento · Blood Orange · Bay Leaf
drinks.description: Jamaican sorrel opens with deep ruby fruit, while roasted ginger, pimento, and bay leaf build warmth beneath a polished blood-orange finish. Familiar in memory, elevated in form.
drinks.closingLine: Honor what shaped you. Carry it forward.
drinks.method: Shake everything except mineral water with ice. Fine-strain into a stemmed goblet over one clear sphere and finish with mineral water.
drinks.garnish: Sorrel bloom and a thin flamed blood-orange coin
drinks.experience: Ruby fruit · roasted ginger · aromatic spice · polished citrus finish
drinks.pairing: Jerk cauliflower steak · coconut rundown · escovitch vegetables
drinks.imageAlt: Legacy zero-proof sorrel cocktail with a clear ice sphere, dried blood orange, and sorrel garnish in a stemmed crystal goblet.

drinks.name: Renaissance
drinks.menuLine: Pink Guava · Passion Fruit · Hibiscus · Lime · Pink Peppercorn
drinks.description: Guava and passion fruit arrive vivid, hibiscus and lime give the composition lift, and a whisper of pink peppercorn extends the finish. Bright without becoming sweet; expressive without losing its poise.
drinks.closingLine: Become more of who you came to be.
drinks.method: Shake everything except mineral water briefly with ice. Double-strain into a chilled coupe, add mineral water, and stir once.
drinks.garnish: Fine lime spiral and one small hibiscus bloom
drinks.experience: Tropical perfume · vivid acidity · floral lift · gently spiced finish
drinks.pairing: King oyster mushroom scallops · mango-pepper relish · coconut-lime purée
drinks.imageAlt: Renaissance zero-proof cocktail with guava color, lime spiral, and hibiscus flower in a wide crystal coupe.

collections.name: Reserve Collection
collections.description: Rare ingredients, measured service, and slower rituals. These compositions reward attention and reveal themselves in chapters rather than all at once.

drinks.name: The Sovereign
drinks.menuLine: Blackcurrant · Mission Fig · Smoked Tea · Cacao · Verjus
drinks.description: Blackcurrant and fig establish a dark-fruit center while smoked tea, cacao, and white verjus create structure around it. The finish is dry, composed, and quietly commanding.
drinks.closingLine: Authority does not need to announce itself.
drinks.method: Stir the still ingredients with ice until chilled. Strain over one clear diamond, finish with mineral water, and stir once.
drinks.garnish: Charred fig slice and three cacao nibs on a slim pick
drinks.experience: Dark fruit · measured smoke · cacao depth · dry vinous finish
drinks.pairing: Peppered oyster-mushroom medallion · cassava fondant · black-garlic jus
drinks.imageAlt: The Sovereign zero-proof cocktail with dark fruit, charred fig, cacao accents, and clear ice in a faceted rocks glass.

drinks.name: Midnight Gold
drinks.menuLine: Roasted Pineapple · Saffron · Toasted Coconut · Lime · Black Pepper
drinks.description: Roasted pineapple carries caramelized depth, saffron gives the center a golden aromatic glow, and toasted coconut water keeps the finish long, mineral, and unexpectedly dry.
drinks.closingLine: Keep the light that belongs to you.
drinks.method: Shake everything except mineral water with ice. Fine-strain into a goblet over one clear sphere and top with mineral water.
drinks.garnish: Dehydrated pineapple fan and three visible saffron threads
drinks.experience: Caramelized pineapple · saffron perfume · toasted coconut · pepper-bright finish
drinks.pairing: Jerk-glazed cauliflower · coconut-rice croquette · pineapple chow
drinks.imageAlt: Midnight Gold zero-proof cocktail with roasted pineapple, saffron, and a clear ice sphere in an elegant crystal goblet.

drinks.name: Quiet Authority
drinks.menuLine: Roasted Pear · Oolong · Lemon Verbena · Celery Seed · Lemon
drinks.description: Roasted pear lends understated richness to floral oolong. Lemon verbena and celery seed sharpen the architecture, leaving a restrained, elegant finish with no wasted movement.
drinks.closingLine: Restraint is its own kind of power.
drinks.method: Stir all ingredients with ice until cold and silky. Fine-strain into a chilled Nick & Nora glass.
drinks.garnish: Long pear-skin ribbon and one lemon-verbena leaf
drinks.experience: Roasted pear · floral tea · green aromatic tension · dry finish
drinks.pairing: Ackee tartlet · thyme pastry · pickled scallion
drinks.imageAlt: Quiet Authority zero-proof pear and oolong cocktail with a pear ribbon and green leaf in a crystal coupe.

drinks.name: Afterglow
drinks.menuLine: Blood Orange · Apricot · Rooibos · Sumac · Vanilla
drinks.description: Blood orange and apricot move through soft rooibos and vanilla before sumac lifts the finish. Warm in color, bright in structure, and designed for the unhurried final hour.
drinks.closingLine: Leave with the warmth, not the weight.
drinks.method: Shake everything except mineral water with ice. Double-strain into a chilled coupe and finish with mineral water.
drinks.garnish: Apricot ribbon and a restrained line of sumac
drinks.experience: Blood orange · ripe apricot · red tea · tart aromatic finish
drinks.pairing: Tamarind-glazed tofu · sweet-potato purée · charred scallion
drinks.imageAlt: Afterglow zero-proof blood orange and apricot cocktail with an orange ribbon in a low crystal coupe.

collections.name: Ital Collection
collections.description: Plant-first Caribbean compositions shaped by roots, leaves, fruit, spice, and restraint. Nourishing in spirit, generous in flavor, and alive from first aroma to final sip.

drinks.name: Grounded
drinks.menuLine: Beet · Carrot · Ginger · Lime · Thyme · Coconut Water
drinks.description: Earthy beet and sweet carrot are sharpened by ginger and lime, while thyme and coconut water soften the edges. Vibrant, savory-leaning, and firmly connected to the ground.
drinks.closingLine: Stand where your values can find you.
drinks.method: Shake all ingredients except mineral water with ice. Fine-strain into a Collins glass over pebble ice and top with mineral water.
drinks.garnish: Carrot ribbon and a short thyme sprig
drinks.experience: Sweet root · bright ginger · lime tension · savory herbal finish
drinks.pairing: Jerk lentil fritters · mango slaw · tamarind pepper sauce
drinks.imageAlt: Grounded zero-proof beet and carrot cocktail with pebble ice, carrot ribbon, and thyme in a tall crystal glass.

drinks.name: Provision
drinks.menuLine: Roasted Pineapple · Tamarind · Toasted Breadfruit · Coconut · Nutmeg
drinks.description: Roasted pineapple and tamarind bring brightness to a subtle toasted-breadfruit cordial. Coconut water and nutmeg make the finish comforting, familiar, and deeply Caribbean.
drinks.closingLine: Enough becomes abundance when it is shared.
drinks.method: Shake the still ingredients with ice. Strain into a ceramic tumbler over one large cube, add mineral water, and grate nutmeg once.
drinks.garnish: Small pineapple-leaf fan and one pass of fresh nutmeg
drinks.experience: Roasted fruit · tangy tamarind · toasted grain · coconut finish
drinks.pairing: Roasted breadfruit · avocado choka · Scotch-bonnet oil
drinks.imageAlt: Provision zero-proof roasted pineapple and tamarind cocktail with a clear cube and pineapple leaf fan in a ceramic tumbler.

drinks.name: Green Wisdom
drinks.menuLine: Green Apple · Cucumber · Callaloo · Basil · Lime · Coconut Water
drinks.description: Green apple and cucumber create a crisp opening; callaloo and basil add a leafy, savory middle; lime and coconut water return the finish to clarity.
drinks.closingLine: Listen closely to what is still growing.
drinks.method: Build in a chilled highball over one clear spear. Add mineral water and lift gently from bottom to top.
drinks.garnish: Cucumber ribbon and one polished basil leaf
drinks.experience: Crisp orchard fruit · leafy green middle · bright lime · clean finish
drinks.pairing: Callaloo-stuffed plantain cup · roasted tomato · herb oil

drinks.name: Roots & Reason
drinks.menuLine: Sarsaparilla · Ginger · Turmeric · Chicory · Lime · Blackstrap
drinks.description: Sarsaparilla and toasted chicory establish a deep root structure. Ginger, turmeric, lime, and a trace of blackstrap bring warmth, brightness, and a long dry-spiced finish.
drinks.closingLine: Think deeply. Choose deliberately.
drinks.method: Shake the still ingredients briefly with ice. Fine-strain over one clear cube, add mineral water, and stir.
drinks.garnish: Thin candied-ginger shard and expressed lime peel
drinks.experience: Root spice · toasted bitterness · bright lime · dry molasses finish
drinks.pairing: Brown-stew mushrooms · yam mash · braised greens

collections.name: Sparkling Collection
collections.description: Effervescent compositions designed for arrivals, milestones, and tables that deserve a collective toast. Bright, lifted, and celebratory without becoming sugary.

drinks.name: First Light
drinks.menuLine: Ruby Grapefruit · White Peach · Lemongrass · Rosemary
drinks.description: Ruby grapefruit and white peach open with brightness; lemongrass and rosemary hold the center; a fine, persistent sparkle keeps the finish weightless.
drinks.closingLine: Every beginning deserves intention.
drinks.method: Add chilled ingredients to a flute in sequence. Stir once from the base without disturbing the bead.
drinks.garnish: Long grapefruit twist and one rosemary blossom
drinks.experience: Ruby citrus · white peach · aromatic grass · persistent dry sparkle
drinks.pairing: Citrus-avocado salad · toasted pumpkin seed · herbs

drinks.name: Jubilee
drinks.menuLine: Strawberry · Lychee · Rose · Lemon
drinks.description: Strawberry and lychee arrive generous and bright, rose appears as perfume rather than sweetness, and lemon gives the celebration a clean, lifted finish.
drinks.closingLine: Let joy take up space.
drinks.method: Build in a chilled coupe. Add sparkling mineral water last and give one slow turn.
drinks.garnish: Fine strawberry fan and one edible rose petal
drinks.experience: Fresh berry · lychee perfume · soft rose · bright sparkling finish
drinks.pairing: Watermelon–cucumber salad · mint · lime · toasted sesame

drinks.name: Golden Hour
drinks.tagline: Hold the light a little longer.
drinks.menuLine: Mango · Tangerine · Chamomile · Ginger Flower
drinks.description: Mango and tangerine create a radiant opening, chamomile softens the center, and ginger flower adds a delicate aromatic lift through the final bubbles.
drinks.closingLine: Some moments are worth extending.
drinks.method: Build over one long clear spear in a wine goblet. Add sparkling mineral water and stir gently.
drinks.garnish: Thin tangerine wheel and one chamomile flower
drinks.experience: Golden fruit · bright citrus · soft chamomile · floral sparkle
drinks.pairing: Curry-chickpea tartlet · mango chutney · scallion

drinks.name: Celebration
drinks.menuLine: Concord Grape · Elderflower · Lemon · Thyme
drinks.description: Concord grape brings color and depth while elderflower, lemon, and thyme keep the composition lifted. Fine bubbles turn even a private victory into a proper toast.
drinks.closingLine: Mark the moment while you are fully in it.
drinks.method: Build in a chilled flute and lift once with a bar spoon to preserve the fine bead.
drinks.garnish: Three small grapes and one tiny thyme tip
drinks.experience: Purple fruit · floral lift · lemon brightness · dry herbal sparkle
drinks.pairing: Crispy oyster-mushroom bites · pepper jelly · scallion

collections.name: Wellness Elixirs
collections.description: Hydration-forward, tea-led, and botanical compositions created for how guests want to feel in the room: clear, replenished, balanced, and fully engaged.

drinks.name: Restore
drinks.menuLine: Coconut Water · Watermelon · Lime · Mint · Sea Salt
drinks.description: Coconut water and fresh watermelon create a cooling base. Lime, mint, and a precise saline finish make the composition crisp, refreshing, and quietly replenishing.
drinks.closingLine: Come back to the center.
drinks.method: Shake everything except mineral water with ice. Strain over pebble ice, top with mineral water, and crown with mint.
drinks.garnish: Watermelon ribbon and a compact mint crown
drinks.experience: Cooling fruit · bright lime · fresh mint · clean saline finish
drinks.pairing: Coconut ceviche · cucumber · hearts of palm · lime

drinks.name: Focus
drinks.menuLine: Sencha · Blueberry · Lemon · Basil · Ginger
drinks.description: Sencha gives the composition a clean tea structure; blueberry adds a quiet fruit note; lemon, basil, and ginger bring definition without heaviness.
drinks.closingLine: Give the moment your full attention.
drinks.method: Build over one clear spear in a highball and stir gently. Contains naturally occurring caffeine from green tea.
drinks.garnish: Three blueberries and one small basil leaf
drinks.experience: Green tea · quiet berry · lemon definition · basil-ginger finish
drinks.pairing: Green-plantain hummus · cassava crisps · herb oil

drinks.name: Balance
drinks.menuLine: Pear · Rooibos · Ginger · Cardamom · Lemon
drinks.description: Pear and rooibos create warmth without weight. Ginger, cardamom, and lemon move in equal measure, leaving the palate calm, clean, and centered.
drinks.closingLine: Neither excess nor absence. Just enough.
drinks.method: Shake the still ingredients briefly with ice. Fine-strain into a stemmed glass and finish with mineral water.
drinks.garnish: Thin pear fan and one cracked green-cardamom pod
drinks.experience: Soft pear · red tea · warming spice · centered citrus finish
drinks.pairing: Mushroom patty · tamarind-onion jam · fresh herbs

drinks.name: Renewal
drinks.menuLine: Tart Cherry · Pomegranate · Rosemary · Lime
drinks.description: Tart cherry and pomegranate create a vivid red-fruit core. Rosemary and lime sharpen the edges and leave a fresh, forward-moving finish.
drinks.closingLine: Begin again without losing what you learned.
drinks.method: Build in a goblet over one clear sphere. Add mineral water last and stir gently.
drinks.garnish: Short rosemary tip and a few pomegranate arils
drinks.experience: Tart red fruit · fresh lime · aromatic rosemary · clean sparkle
drinks.pairing: Smoked-beet carpaccio · orange · pistachio · herbs

collections.name: Dessert & Seasonal
collections.description: Rich, aromatic compositions designed to close the meal with intention. Indulgent without becoming careless, and seasonal without becoming novelty.

drinks.name: Velvet
drinks.menuLine: Black Cherry · Cold Brew · Vanilla · Cacao · Oat Cream
drinks.description: Black cherry and cold brew create depth while vanilla, cacao, and oat cream soften the architecture. Silken, dark, and balanced enough to remain a drink rather than become dessert in a glass.
drinks.closingLine: Indulgence can still have discipline.
drinks.method: Shake hard with ice until fully aerated. Double-strain into a chilled coupe. Contains naturally occurring caffeine from coffee.
drinks.garnish: Fine cacao veil and one brandied-style alcohol-free cherry
drinks.experience: Black cherry · roasted coffee · cacao · silken vanilla finish
drinks.pairing: Dark-chocolate tart · cherry compote · cacao nib

drinks.name: Cocoa Ceremony
drinks.menuLine: Cacao · Toasted Coconut · Cinnamon · Orange · Oat Cream
drinks.description: Cacao and toasted coconut form a deep, fragrant base. Cinnamon, orange oil, and oat cream create warmth and length, whether served chilled or as a slow warm ritual.
drinks.closingLine: Some pleasures are meant to be unhurried.
drinks.method: For chilled service, shake with ice and strain into a ceramic cup. For warm service, heat gently without boiling and serve immediately.
drinks.garnish: Toasted coconut and expressed orange oil
drinks.experience: Deep cacao · toasted coconut · warm cinnamon · orange-oil finish
drinks.pairing: Coconut bread pudding · alcohol-free caramel · orange zest

drinks.name: Harvest Moon
drinks.menuLine: Roasted Apple · Pumpkin · Maple · Sage · Rooibos
drinks.description: Roasted apple and pumpkin bring autumn depth; maple is used with restraint; sage and rooibos keep the finish aromatic, structured, and distinctly grown-up.
drinks.closingLine: Gather what the season came to teach.
drinks.method: Shake the still ingredients with ice. Strain over one clear cube, finish with mineral water, and stir once.
drinks.garnish: Thin roasted-apple chip and one small sage leaf
drinks.experience: Roasted orchard fruit · pumpkin warmth · restrained maple · dry sage finish
drinks.pairing: Apple-spice cake · pecan crumble · coconut cream

drinks.name: Sunday Best
drinks.menuLine: Roasted Sweet Potato · Chicory · Vanilla · Pecan · Nutmeg
drinks.description: Roasted sweet potato, chicory, vanilla, and toasted pecan create a composed final course. Nutmeg lifts the aroma while oat cream carries a long, comforting finish.
drinks.closingLine: End beautifully. Begin tomorrow clearly.
drinks.method: Shake vigorously with ice until smooth and aerated. Double-strain into a small goblet and grate nutmeg once.
drinks.garnish: One pecan-praline shard and fresh nutmeg
drinks.experience: Roasted sweet potato · toasted chicory · vanilla · pecan-spice finish
drinks.pairing: Sweet-potato pudding · coconut whip · toasted pecan
